normal.title: Normal Skin
normal.description: Normal skin is balanced with minimal oiliness or dryness. It usually has small pores and smooth texture.

oily.title: Oily Skin
oily.description: Oily skin produces excess sebum and is prone to acne and clogged pores.

dry.title: Dry Skin
dry.description: Dry skin lacks moisture and may appear flaky or rough.

combination.title: Combination Skin
combination.description: Combination skin has oily T-zone and dry cheeks.
